SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
WITH GoldConsolidatedMMR AS(
SELECT DISTINCT 
   SubscriberID
  ,CAST(EnrollmentYear AS INT) as serviceyear
  ,BeneficiaryID 
  ,TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(EnrollmentMonth, 'MMMyyyy') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS MO_FROM_DATE
  ,last_day(TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(EnrollmentMonth, 'MMMyyyy') AS TIMESTAMP))) AS MO_TO_DATE			
  ,TotalPartCPayment
  ,trim(PartCRAFactorTypeCode) as PartCRAFactorTypeCode
  ,trim(PartCDefaultRiskFactorCode)  AS  DEFAULT_INDICATOR 
  ,trim(Hospice) as Hospice
  ,trim(ESRD) as ESRD
  ,MedicaidDualStatusCode 
  ,PlanBenefitPackage as PBP
  ,OriginalReasonforEntitlement
  ,PlanID 
  ,MedicaidIndicator
  ,DOB AS DATEOFBIRTH
  ,Gendercode
  ,PlanBenefitPackage AS PLAN_BENEFIT_PACKAGE_ID 
  ,StateandCountyCode
  ,RiskAdjusterFactorA AS  RISK_ADJUSTER_FACTOR_A 
  ,CASE 
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode IN ('CP','CN','CF') AND ifnull(trim(MedicaidDualStatusCode), '') <> '' THEN   
					CASE 
                         WHEN trim(MedicaidDualStatusCode) IN ('01','03','05','06') THEN 'CP'
						 WHEN trim(MedicaidDualStatusCode) IN ('02','04','08','10') THEN 'CF' ELSE 'CN' 
					END
    ELSE  		   
					CASE 
                      WHEN ifnull(trim(PartCRAFactorTypeCode),'') = '' AND PartCRAFactorTypeCode in ('1','Y') THEN 'E'
                      ELSE PartCRAFactorTypeCode
					END
    END AS RAF,
    int(datediff(current_timestamp, DOB)/365) as age
FROM ConsolidatedMMR
WHERE 
TotalPartCPayment > 0   
AND 
cast(EnrollmentYear as int) between year(current_date()) - 3 and year(current_date())
AND 
ifnull(EnrollmentMonth, '') <> '' 
),
Segment AS(
SELECT DISTINCT 
   SubscriberID
  ,serviceyear
  ,BeneficiaryID 
  ,MO_FROM_DATE
  ,MO_TO_DATE
  ,TotalPartCPayment
  ,PartCRAFactorTypeCode
  ,DEFAULT_INDICATOR 
  ,Hospice
  ,ESRD
  ,MedicaidDualStatusCode 
  ,PBP
  ,OriginalReasonforEntitlement
  ,PlanID
  ,MedicaidIndicator
  ,DATEOFBIRTH
  ,Gendercode
  ,PLAN_BENEFIT_PACKAGE_ID 
  ,StateandCountyCode
  ,RISK_ADJUSTER_FACTOR_A
  ,RAF
  ,age
  ,CASE 
    WHEN RAF = 'CP' and (OriginalReasonforEntitlement =0  or age>=65 ) THEN 'CPA' 
    WHEN RAF = 'CP' and (OriginalReasonforEntitlement!=0 or AGE<65  ) then 'CPD'
    WHEN RAF  ='CF' and (OriginalReasonforEntitlement =0  or Age>=65 ) THEN 'CFA' 
    WHEN RAF = 'CF' and (OriginalReasonforEntitlement !=0 or AGE<65  ) then 'CFD' 
    WHEN RAF  ='CN' and (OriginalReasonforEntitlement =0  or Age>=65 ) THEN 'CNA' 
    WHEN RAF = 'CN' and (OriginalReasonforEntitlement !=0 or AGE<65  ) then 'CND'
    WHEN RAF  ='E' THEN 'NE'
    WHEN RAF  ='I' THEN 'INS'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode in (null,'') and ESRD in (null,'') and HOSPICE in (null,'') and Default_Indicator in ('','N') THEN 'NULL'
    WHEN ESRD in (null,'') and HOSPICE='Y' then 'Hospice'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode in ('C1','C2') then 'GC'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode in ('G1','G2','I1','I2') then 'GI'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode in ('D') then 'DI'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode in ('ED') then 'DNE'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode in ('E1','E2') then 'GNE'
    When PartCRAFactorTypeCode='SE' then 'SNP'
    when PartCRAFactorTypeCode='' and Default_indicator in ('','N') and HOSPICE='Y' and ESRD='Y' then 'Hospice, ESRD'
    WHEN PartCRAFactorTypeCode not in ('CP','CN','CF','C','I','E','C1','C2','E2') and ESRD='Y' then 'ESRD'
    when PartCRAFactorTypeCode ='' and Default_indicator=3 then 'ESRD'
   END AS SEGMENT 	
  ,CASE WHEN MO_FROM_DAte > date_sub(current_date(),  dayOfMonth(current_date())) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS MemMnth  
FROM GoldConsolidatedMMR a
),
CMMRWithSegment AS(
SELECT DISTINCT 
   b.SubscriberID
  ,b.serviceyear
  ,b.BeneficiaryID 
  ,b.MO_FROM_DATE
  ,b.MO_TO_DATE
  ,b.TotalPartCPayment
  ,b.PartCRAFactorTypeCode
  ,b.DEFAULT_INDICATOR 
  ,b.Hospice
  ,b.ESRD
  ,b.MedicaidDualStatusCode 
  ,b.PBP
  ,b.OriginalReasonforEntitlement
  ,b.PlanID
  ,b.MedicaidIndicator
  ,b.DATEOFBIRTH
  ,b.Gendercode
  ,b.PLAN_BENEFIT_PACKAGE_ID 
  ,b.StateandCountyCode
  ,b.RISK_ADJUSTER_FACTOR_A
  ,b.RAF
  ,b.age
  ,b.SEGMENT
  ,b.MemMnth 
  ,m.FirstName
  ,m.LastName
  ,m.PermanentAddressLine1
  ,m.PermanentAddressLine2
  ,m.PermanentCity
  ,m.PermanentCounty
  ,m.PermanentState
  ,m.PermanentZIPCode
  ,CASE 
    WHEN b.SEGMENT='INS' THEN 'Institutional'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT IN ('GC','GNE','DI','GI','DNE') THEN 'ESRD'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT='HOSPICE, ESRD' THEN b.SEGMENT
    WHEN b.SEGMENT='NE' THEN 'New Enrollee'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT='HOSPICE' THEN 'Hospice'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT='ESRD' THEN 'ESRD'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT LIKE 'CN%' THEN 'Full Risk Community'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT LIKE 'CP%' THEN 'Partial Dual'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT LIKE 'CF%' THEN 'Full Dual'
    WHEN b.SEGMENT='SNP' THEN 'New Enrollee Chronic Care SNP'
   END AS MEMBERSTATUS
  ,ifnull(m.PlanMemberID,m.UniquePersonKey) AS MemberID
  ,row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY b.BeneficiaryID,year(b.mo_from_date) ORDER BY b.mo_from_date DESC) as Is_latest 
  ,sum(b.MemMnth) OVER(PARTITION BY b.BeneficiaryID,year(b.mo_from_date)) as MM
FROM Segment b
  LEFT JOIN Member m
      ON b.BeneficiaryID = m.BeneficiaryID
),
Final AS(
SELECT DISTINCT 
     '#clientCode' AS ClientCode
	,current_date() AS snapshotDate
	,concat(cast(year(current_date()) as varchar(4)), cast(month(current_date()) as varchar(2))) as reportMonth	
    ,CAST(serviceYear AS INT) as serviceYear  
    ,ifnull(c.MemberID,'') as MemberID
    ,to_date(MO_FROM_DATE,"MM/dd/yyyy") as enrollmentStartDate
    ,to_date(MO_to_DATE,"MM/dd/yyyy") as enrollmentEndDate
    ,to_date(DATEOFBIRTH,"MM/dd/yyyy") as memberDOB
    ,ifnull(c.Gendercode,'') as memberGender
    ,ifnull(c.BeneficiaryID,'') as BeneficiaryID
    ,ifnull(c.planID,'') as CMSContractnumber 
	,ifnull(p.PlanDescription,'') as PlanDescription 
    ,ifnull(c.FirstName,'') as memberFirstName
    ,ifnull(c.LastName,'') as memberLastName
    ,ifnull(mr.providerID,'') as providerID    
    ,TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(mr.reportMonth, 'yyyyMM') AS TIMESTAMP)) AS providerEffectiveStartDate
    ,last_day(TO_DATE(CAST(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(mr.reportMonth, 'yyyyMM') AS TIMESTAMP))) AS providerEffectiveEndDate     
	,c.age as memberAge
    ,ifnull(c.permanentAddressLine1,'') as permanentAddressLine1
    ,ifnull(c.permanentAddressLine2,'') as permanentAddressLine2
    ,'' as permanentAddressLine3
    ,ifnull(c.permanentCity,'') as permanentCity
    ,ifnull(c.permanentCounty,'') as permanentCounty
    ,ifnull(c.permanentState,'') as permanentState
    ,ifnull(c.permanentZIPCode,'') as permanentZIPCode
    ,ifnull(c.PBP,'') as PBP
    ,ifnull(mr.ProviderNPI,'') as ProviderNPI
    ,ifnull(ifnull(mr.providerFirstName,'') +ifnull(mr.providerLastName,'') ,'') as  ProviderName
    ,ifnull(mr.POCode,'') as ProviderTIN
    ,ifnull(mr.POName,'') as ProviderOrganization
    ,ifnull(mr.PracticeName,'') as PracticeUnit
    ,ifnull(ifnull(mr.POCode,mr.PracticeCode),'') as PoolID
    ,ifnull(PartCRAFactorTypeCode,'') as Rafactortypecode
    ,ifnull(RAF,'') as RafactortypecodeDrived
    ,ifnull(Default_Indicator,'') as DefaultIndicator
    ,ifnull(c.MedicaidDualStatusCode,'') as MedicaidDualStatusCode
    ,ifnull(c.MedicaidIndicator,'') as MedicaidIndicator
    ,ifnull(c.OriginalReasonforEntitlement,'') as OriginalReasonforEntitlement
    ,ifnull(RISK_ADJUSTER_FACTOR_A,'') as RiskAdjusterFactorA
    ,ifnull(RISK_ADJUSTER_FACTOR_A,'') as RiskAdjusterFactorB    
    ,ifnull(c.Hospice,'') as Hospice
    ,ifnull(c.ESRD,'') as ESRD
    ,'' as LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero
    ,'' as LowIncomeSubsidy
    ,NULL as MinimumEffectiveDate
    ,CAST(mm AS INT) as TotalMemberMonths
    ,ifnull(Segment,'') as Segment
    ,ifnull(Memberstatus,'') as Memberstatus
    ,CAST(case when Is_latest = 1 then 1 else 0 end AS BOOLEAN) IsLatest
    ,to_date(MIN(date_format(MO_FROM_DATE,"MM/dd/yyyy")) over (partition by MemberID, serviceYear),"MM/dd/yyyy") as MinimumStartDate
    ,to_date(MAX(date_format(MO_to_DATE,"MM/dd/yyyy")) over (partition by MemberID, serviceYear),"MM/dd/yyyy") as MaximumEndDate
    ,ifnull(mr.ProviderAddress1,'') as AttributedProviderOffice
    ,ifnull(drs.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor,'') as DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
    ,row_number() over (partition by MemberID, MO_FROM_DATE,concat(cast(year(current_date()) as varchar(4)), cast(month(current_date()) as varchar(2))) order by MO_FROM_DATE ) as rn
FROM CMMRWithSegment c
  LEFT JOIN MemberRoster mr
    ON mr.PlanMemberID = c.MemberID
  LEFT JOIN DemographicRiskScore drs
    ON c. MemberID = drs.PlanMemberID
  LEFT JOIN PlanXref p
    ON c.PlanID = p.PlanID
WHERE  
ifnull(memberID, '') <> ''
)
SELECT 
	 ClientCode
	,SnapshotDate
	,ReportMonth
	,ServiceYear
	,MemberID
	,EnrollmentStartDate
	,EnrollmentEndDate
	,MemberDOB
	,MemberGender
	,BeneficiaryID
	,CMSContractnumber
	,PlanDescription
	,MemberFirstName
	,MemberLastName
	,ProviderID
	,ProviderEffectiveStartDate
	,ProviderEffectiveEndDate
	,MemberAge
	,PermanentAddressLine1
	,PermanentAddressLine2
	,PermanentAddressLine3
	,PermanentCity
	,PermanentCounty
	,PermanentState
	,PermanentZIPCode
	,PBP
	,ProviderNPI
	,ProviderName
	,ProviderTIN
	,ProviderOrganization
	,PracticeUnit
	,PoolID
	,Rafactortypecode
	,RafactortypecodeDrived
	,DefaultIndicator
	,MedicaidDualStatusCode
	,MedicaidIndicator
	,OriginalReasonforEntitlement
	,RiskAdjusterFactorA
	,RiskAdjusterFactorB
	,Hospice
	,ESRD
	,LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero
	,LowIncomeSubsidy
	,MinimumEffectiveDate
	,TotalMemberMonths
	,Segment
	,Memberstatus
	,IsLatest
	,MinimumStartDate
	,MaximumEndDate
	,AttributedProviderOffice
	,DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor 
FROM Final 
WHERE 
rn = 1
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
select 1
from tempSQLScript
group by MemberID, EnrollmentStartDate, ReportMonth
having count(1) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
with cte_data as (
select
ifnull(ss.ClientCode,dt.ClientCode) as ClientCode
,ifnull(ss.SnapshotDate,dt.SnapshotDate) as SnapshotDate
,ifnull(ss.ReportMonth,dt.ReportMonth) as ReportMonth
,ifnull(ss.ServiceYear,dt.ServiceYear) as ServiceYear
,ifnull(ss.MemberID,dt.MemberID) AS MemberID
,ifnull(ss.EnrollmentStartDate,dt.EnrollmentStartDate) AS EnrollmentStartDate
,ifnull(ss.EnrollmentEndDate,dt.EnrollmentEndDate) AS EnrollmentEndDate
,ifnull(ss.MemberDOB,dt.MemberDOB) AS MemberDOB
,ifnull(ss.MemberGender,dt.MemberGender) AS MemberGender
,ifnull(ss.BeneficiaryID,dt.BeneficiaryID) AS BeneficiaryID
,ifnull(ss.CMSContractnumber,dt.CMSContractnumber) AS CMSContractnumber
,ifnull(ss.PlanDescription,dt.PlanDescription) AS PlanDescription
,ifnull(ss.MemberFirstName,dt.MemberFirstName) AS MemberFirstName
,ifnull(ss.MemberLastName,dt.MemberLastName) AS MemberLastName
,ifnull(ss.ProviderID,dt.ProviderID) AS ProviderID
,ifnull(ss.ProviderEffectiveStartDate,dt.ProviderEffectiveStartDate) AS ProviderEffectiveStartDate
,ifnull(ss.ProviderEffectiveEndDate,dt.ProviderEffectiveEndDate) AS ProviderEffectiveEndDate
,ifnull(ss.MemberAge,dt.MemberAge) AS MemberAge
,ifnull(ss.PermanentAddressLine1,dt.PermanentAddressLine1) AS PermanentAddressLine1
,ifnull(ss.PermanentAddressLine2,dt.PermanentAddressLine2) AS PermanentAddressLine2
,ifnull(ss.PermanentAddressLine3,dt.PermanentAddressLine3) AS PermanentAddressLine3
,ifnull(ss.PermanentCity,dt.PermanentCity) AS PermanentCity
,ifnull(ss.PermanentCounty,dt.PermanentCounty) AS PermanentCounty
,ifnull(ss.PermanentState,dt.PermanentState) AS PermanentState
,ifnull(ss.PermanentZIPCode,dt.PermanentZIPCode) AS PermanentZIPCode
,ifnull(ss.PBP,dt.PBP) AS PBP
,ifnull(ss.ProviderNPI,dt.ProviderNPI) AS ProviderNPI
,ifnull(ss.ProviderName,dt.ProviderName) AS ProviderName
,ifnull(ss.ProviderTIN,dt.ProviderTIN) AS ProviderTIN
,ifnull(ss.ProviderOrganization,dt.ProviderOrganization) AS ProviderOrganization
,ifnull(ss.PracticeUnit,dt.PracticeUnit) AS PracticeUnit
,ifnull(ss.PoolID,dt.PoolID) AS PoolID
,ifnull(ss.Rafactortypecode,dt.Rafactortypecode) AS Rafactortypecode
,ifnull(ss.RafactortypecodeDrived,dt.RafactortypecodeDrived) AS RafactortypecodeDrived
,ifnull(ss.DefaultIndicator,dt.DefaultIndicator) AS DefaultIndicator
,ifnull(ss.MedicaidDualStatusCode,dt.MedicaidDualStatusCode) AS MedicaidDualStatusCode
,ifnull(ss.MedicaidIndicator,dt.MedicaidIndicator)  as MedicaidIndicator
,ifnull(ss.OriginalReasonforEntitlement,dt.OriginalReasonforEntitlement) AS OriginalReasonforEntitlement
,ifnull(ss.RiskAdjusterFactorA,dt.RiskAdjusterFactorA) AS RiskAdjusterFactorA
,ifnull(ss.RiskAdjusterFactorB,dt.RiskAdjusterFactorB) as RiskAdjusterFactorB
,ifnull(ss.Hospice,dt.Hospice) AS Hospice
,ifnull(ss.ESRD,dt.ESRD) AS ESRD
,ifnull(ss.LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero,dt.LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero) AS LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero
,ifnull(ss.LowIncomeSubsidy,dt.LowIncomeSubsidy) AS LowIncomeSubsidy
,ifnull(ss.MinimumEffectiveDate,dt.MinimumEffectiveDate) AS MinimumEffectiveDate
,ifnull(ss.TotalMemberMonths,dt.TotalMemberMonths) AS TotalMemberMonths
,ifnull(ss.Segment,dt.Segment) AS Segment
,ifnull(ss.Memberstatus,dt.Memberstatus) AS Memberstatus
,ifnull(ss.IsLatest,dt.IsLatest) AS IsLatest
,ifnull(ss.MinimumStartDate,dt.MinimumStartDate) AS MinimumStartDate
,ifnull(ss.MaximumEndDate,dt.MaximumEndDate) AS MaximumEndDate
,ifnull(ss.AttributedProviderOffice,dt.AttributedProviderOffice) AS AttributedProviderOffice
,ifnull(ss.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor,dt.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor) AS DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
, case when ss.MemberID = dt.MemberID and ss.EnrollmentStartDate = dt.EnrollmentStartDate and ss.ReportMonth = dt.ReportMonth then 'update'
       when ifnull(ss.MemberID, '') = '' or ifnull(ss.EnrollmentStartDate,'')= '' or  ifnull(ss.ReportMonth,'') = '' then  'delete'
	end actioncode
FROM tempSQLScript ss 
FULL OUTER JOIN  DestinationTable dt 
ON ss.MemberID = dt.MemberID
and ss.EnrollmentStartDate = dt.EnrollmentStartDate
and ss.ReportMonth = dt.ReportMonth
)
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING (SELECT * from cte_data) s ON s.MemberID = t.MemberID
and s.EnrollmentStartDate = t.EnrollmentStartDate
and s.ReportMonth = t.ReportMonth
WHEN MATCHED  and actioncode = 'delete' THEN DELETE
WHEN MATCHED  and actioncode = 'update' THEN UPDATE
SET 
t.ClientCode=s.ClientCode
,t.SnapshotDate=s.SnapshotDate
,t.ServiceYear=s.ServiceYear
,t.EnrollmentEndDate=s.EnrollmentEndDate
,t.MemberDOB=s.MemberDOB
,t.MemberGender=s.MemberGender
,t.BeneficiaryID=s.BeneficiaryID
,t.CMSContractnumber=s.CMSContractnumber
,t.PlanDescription=s.PlanDescription
,t.MemberFirstName=s.MemberFirstName
,t.MemberLastName=s.MemberLastName
,t.ProviderID=s.ProviderID
,t.ProviderEffectiveStartDate=s.ProviderEffectiveStartDate
,t.ProviderEffectiveEndDate=s.ProviderEffectiveEndDate
,t.MemberAge=s.MemberAge
,t.PermanentAddressLine1=s.PermanentAddressLine1
,t.PermanentAddressLine2=s.PermanentAddressLine2
,t.PermanentAddressLine3=s.PermanentAddressLine3
,t.PermanentCity=s.PermanentCity
,t.PermanentCounty=s.PermanentCounty
,t.PermanentState=s.PermanentState
,t.PermanentZIPCode=s.PermanentZIPCode
,t.PBP=s.PBP
,t.ProviderNPI=s.ProviderNPI
,t.ProviderName=s.ProviderName
,t.ProviderTIN=s.ProviderTIN
,t.ProviderOrganization=s.ProviderOrganization
,t.PracticeUnit=s.PracticeUnit
,t.PoolID=s.PoolID
,t.Rafactortypecode=s.Rafactortypecode
,t.RafactortypecodeDrived=s.RafactortypecodeDrived
,t.DefaultIndicator=s.DefaultIndicator
,t.MedicaidDualStatusCode=s.MedicaidDualStatusCode
,t.MedicaidIndicator=s.MedicaidIndicator
,t.OriginalReasonforEntitlement=s.OriginalReasonforEntitlement
,t.RiskAdjusterFactorA=s.RiskAdjusterFactorA
,t.RiskAdjusterFactorB=s.RiskAdjusterFactorB
,t.Hospice=s.Hospice
,t.ESRD=s.ESRD
,t.LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero=s.LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero
,t.LowIncomeSubsidy=s.LowIncomeSubsidy
,t.MinimumEffectiveDate=s.MinimumEffectiveDate
,t.TotalMemberMonths=s.TotalMemberMonths
,t.Segment=s.Segment
,t.Memberstatus=s.Memberstatus
,t.IsLatest=s.IsLatest
,t.MinimumStartDate=s.MinimumStartDate
,t.MaximumEndDate=s.MaximumEndDate
,t.AttributedProviderOffice=s.AttributedProviderOffice
,t.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor=s.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor

WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
ClientCode
,SnapshotDate
,ReportMonth
,ServiceYear
,MemberID
,EnrollmentStartDate
,EnrollmentEndDate
,MemberDOB
,MemberGender
,BeneficiaryID
,CMSContractnumber
,PlanDescription
,MemberFirstName
,MemberLastName
,ProviderID
,ProviderEffectiveStartDate
,ProviderEffectiveEndDate
,MemberAge
,PermanentAddressLine1
,PermanentAddressLine2
,PermanentAddressLine3
,PermanentCity
,PermanentCounty
,PermanentState
,PermanentZIPCode
,PBP
,ProviderNPI
,ProviderName
,ProviderTIN
,ProviderOrganization
,PracticeUnit
,PoolID
,Rafactortypecode
,RafactortypecodeDrived
,DefaultIndicator
,MedicaidDualStatusCode
,MedicaidIndicator
,OriginalReasonforEntitlement
,RiskAdjusterFactorA
,RiskAdjusterFactorB
,Hospice
,ESRD
,LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero
,LowIncomeSubsidy
,MinimumEffectiveDate
,TotalMemberMonths
,Segment
,Memberstatus
,IsLatest
,MinimumStartDate
,MaximumEndDate
,AttributedProviderOffice
,DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor
) VALUES  (
s.ClientCode
,s.SnapshotDate
,s.ReportMonth
,s.ServiceYear
,s.MemberID
,s.EnrollmentStartDate
,s.EnrollmentEndDate
,s.MemberDOB
,s.MemberGender
,s.BeneficiaryID
,s.CMSContractnumber
,s.PlanDescription
,s.MemberFirstName
,s.MemberLastName
,s.ProviderID
,s.ProviderEffectiveStartDate
,s.ProviderEffectiveEndDate
,s.MemberAge
,s.PermanentAddressLine1
,s.PermanentAddressLine2
,s.PermanentAddressLine3
,s.PermanentCity
,s.PermanentCounty
,s.PermanentState
,s.PermanentZIPCode
,s.PBP
,s.ProviderNPI
,s.ProviderName
,s.ProviderTIN
,s.ProviderOrganization
,s.PracticeUnit
,s.PoolID
,s.Rafactortypecode
,s.RafactortypecodeDrived
,s.DefaultIndicator
,s.MedicaidDualStatusCode
,s.MedicaidIndicator
,s.OriginalReasonforEntitlement
,s.RiskAdjusterFactorA
,s.RiskAdjusterFactorB
,s.Hospice
,s.ESRD
,s.LowIncomeSubsidyMMRNonzero
,s.LowIncomeSubsidy
,s.MinimumEffectiveDate
,s.TotalMemberMonths
,s.Segment
,s.Memberstatus
,s.IsLatest
,s.MinimumStartDate
,s.MaximumEndDate
,s.AttributedProviderOffice
,s.DemographicRiskAdjustmentFactor)
